module.name: no-with
module.description: Disallow with statements because they make scope resolution unpredictable.

scenarios.name: should allow regular block statements and property access
scenarios.given: a function that accesses object properties via normal dot notation
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function body

scenarios.name: should report a with statement
scenarios.given: a with (obj) { ... } statement in source code
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the WithStatement node
